review_text: This Khan Academy SAT Prep is honestly amazing. I used it for 3 months and my score went from 922 to 1438. The progress tracking feature is what really made the difference. Highly recommend for anyone preparing for ACT.

My older sibling recommended ACT Prep Plus and wow, it's great. The timed drills helped me understand reading passages so much better. Already seeing results after 2 months.

One star. Khan Academy SAT Prep crashed daily and lost all my progress. 2 weeks of work gone. The video lessons is a joke compared to Barron's. Please fix this ASAP.
